chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-877 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 3445/24 2.For orders on CMA 3446/24 3.For hearing of main case. 29-05-2024 Mr. Arif Ali Abbasi, Advocate for petitioner. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. This petition has been filed for issuance of Bardana/Wheat Bags from the Food Department. Record shows that petitioner before filing this petition has never approached the relevant officials for the purpose and there is no proof that the request of the petitioner has been declined. No case for indulgence therefore is made out. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application(s) is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
